description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly matte black and metallic gray finish. The body is robust, with a squared receiver and angular lines, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a cylindrical muzzle and a secondary tube beneath, suggesting a pump-action mechanism. The stock is minimalistic, resembling a pistol grip with an extended rear section, and lacks a traditional shoulder rest. The trigger guard is squared and substantial, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Various panels, rails, and mechanical details are visible, indicating modularity and rugged construction suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black and metallic gray finish, featuring a squared receiver, short barrel, and pistol grip stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, squared receiver, pistol grip, and short barrel with a secondary tube beneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical muzzle, secondary tube, and the width of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the grip and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, grip, and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a secondary tube beneath, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated trigger guard with ample space and reinforced edges
